## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Swoogo and GrowthX to discuss blog performance, strategy, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=53.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog traffic has doubled in the past month, with engagement rates remaining steady despite increased content volume](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Current focus is on long-tail keywords to build authority; will transition to short-tail keywords like "event registration" in coming months](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Team is considering implementing lead magnets to capture emails and nurture prospects](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
  - [Swoogo's customer event in early November may impact meeting attendance and priorities](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)

## Topics

### Blog Performance Overview

  - [15 new articles published last week, total of 82 articles published by GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=83.0)
  - [Last 28 days: 1,700 clicks (60% increase), 266k impressions (100% increase)](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [200 total blog posts on Swoogo website:](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=123.0)
      - [118 existing articles: 177 clicks, 22k impressions (weekly)](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
      - [67 new articles: 238 clicks, 48k impressions (weekly)](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=164.0)
      - [25 content refreshes: 56 clicks, 11k impressions (weekly)](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)

### Traffic and Engagement Trends

  - [Traffic doubled from 1,400 to \~2,800 visits in September](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Engagement rate remained relatively flat despite increased content volume](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Maintaining flat engagement with increased traffic viewed positively by internal SEO expert (Hamilton)](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)

### Keyword Strategy and Rankings

  - [Current focus on long-tail keywords to build authority and gain "quick wins"](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=610.0)
  - [Plan to transition to short-tail keywords (e.g., "event registration", "event management") in coming months](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=639.0)
  - [Will monitor short-tail keyword performance for 1-2 months before considering backlink strategies](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=733.0)
  - [Team to set up position tracking for key terms in SEMrush for weekly reporting](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Content Performance

  - [Significant growth in impressions and clicks over past 7 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Projecting to achieve same 7-week results in just 2 weeks moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=1348.0)
  - [Content refreshes showing positive results: from 1-2 clicks/day to 15 clicks/day](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)

### Lead Generation Strategy

  - [Discussing implementation of lead magnets to capture emails from blog traffic](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
  - [Considering offering eBooks or PDFs related to popular content topics (e.g., school/party planning)](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=1520.0)
  - [Goal: nurture leads through email sequences before pushing for demo bookings](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=1538.0)
  - [Plan to A/B test different lead magnet types, placements, and messaging](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=1557.0)

### Team Updates

  - [New Director of Branding & Content starting October 21st](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Large customer event (On Con) occurring first week of November](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Prateek to set up keyword position tracking in SEMrush for "event registration" and "event management"](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=836.0)
  - [Stacey to provide login credentials for SEMrush access](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=876.0)
  - [Team to begin planning lead magnet strategy and implementation](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
  - [Consider adjusting meeting schedule around upcoming customer event](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=1664.0)
  - [Post-event: Deeper strategy discussions on content program's future (3-6 months out)](https://fathom.video/share/c2zWzcoCP5BhTJxWG4P7CFvDgzPcc5u7?tab=summary&timestamp=1768.0)
